description_long: This is a classic wind-up alarm clock with a rounded, metallic body finished in a warm bronze color. The clock features two large silver bells on top, connected by a curved handle, and a hammer mechanism between them for ringing. The face of the clock is circular and white, with bold black hour and minute hands but no visible numerals or tick marks. On the back, a prominent wind-up key is attached, indicating a mechanical movement. The clock stands on four short, pointed legs, giving it stability on flat surfaces. The overall design is retro and functional, with a sturdy, metallic construction and a simple, utilitarian aesthetic.
description: A retro wind-up alarm clock with a bronze body, silver bells, and a white face with black hands. It features a wind-up key and stands on four pointed legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white clock face with black hands, bronze body, and both silver bells on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the bronze body, the wind-up key protruding from the back, and the profile of the bells.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wind-up key, the back of the bronze body, and the supporting legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side profile of the bells and the absence of the wind-up key on this side.
attribute_face_design: Circular white face with no numerals or tick marks, featuring bold black hour and minute hands.
